content: Rudd (John Cena) has the perfect life – great job, loving family, and a thriving career as a real estate agent… until his little brother, Marcus (Eric Andre), crashes back into his world as a full-blown agent of chaos, stress-testing every part of Rudd’s carefully controlled existence. Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81521988 About Netflix: Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. Little Brother | Official Trailer | Netflix https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix
chineseTitle: 小兄弟|官方预告片| Netflix
chineseContent: 路德（约翰·塞纳饰）拥有完美的生活——出色的工作、充满爱的家庭以及作为房地产经纪人的蓬勃发展的职业生涯……直到他的弟弟马库斯（埃里克·安德烈饰）作为一个成熟的混乱代理人重新闯入他的世界，对路德精心控制的生活的每一个部分进行压力测试。在 Netflix 上观看：https://www.netflix.com/title/81521988 关于 Netflix：Netflix 是世界领先的娱乐服务公司之一，提供多种类型和语言的电视剧、电影、游戏和现场节目。会员可以随时随地随意播放、暂停和继续观看，并且可以随时更改计划。小兄弟|官方预告片| Netflix https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
